surface_verification.justification: Docs + one-time triage.jsonl data migration; no startable user surface.

behaviors.behavior: plugin_sync_reminder durable-triage emit (main-redirect) unchanged after the docstring correction
triage_gc --apply drops only pure machine-churn dismissals and preserves all open/promoted/human-curated items
behaviors.evidence: diff vs .bak: removed=53 all dismissed, 0 open/promoted lost, 0 status changes on kept; churn_merge.validate_triage_text=0 errors; shared/tests/test_triage_gc.py PASSED

behaviors.behavior: triage_inbox.md is a derived view of the canonical jsonl (126 items / 11 open, matches the WebUI)
behaviors.evidence: aggregate_triage.py regenerated '126 items, 11 triage'; aggregate_triage covered by shared/tests

behaviors.behavior: docs/glossary/hooks-matrix/architecture + hook docstrings accurately state triage.jsonl is git-tracked (no stale 'gitignored')
behaviors.reason: prose accuracy is an editorial judgment; ruff + full shared suite confirm no drift test broke, but content correctness is not machine-assertable
